description: Organization and Library Enhancements (items 51-60): Drag-and-drop playlists, smart playlists, folder organization, tag system, rating system (1-5 stars), import/export playlists, playlist cover generator, collaborative playlists, queue history, and listening journal.
steps: 1. Enhance app/playlists/page.tsx: add drag-and-drop reordering using HTML5 Drag and Drop API (draggable, ondragstart, ondragover, ondrop) to reorder songs within playlists. Show drag handle icon.

2. Create lib/smart-playlists.ts and app/components/SmartPlaylists.tsx: auto-updating playlists based on rules (top songs this week based on play count, recently discovered, most played genre). Compute from listening history on render.
3. Create lib/playlist-folders.ts and enhance playlists page: add folder support - create folders, drag playlists into folders, expand/collapse folders. Store folder structure in localStorage.

4. Create lib/tags.ts and app/components/TagSystem.tsx: allow adding custom tags (#workout, #chill, #roadtrip) to songs. Store tag-to-trackId mapping in localStorage. Show tags on track cards and allow filtering by tag.

5. Create lib/ratings.ts and app/components/StarRating.tsx: 1-5 star rating system for songs. Show interactive star display on track detail pages and track cards. Store ratings in localStorage. Allow sorting by rating.

6. Create app/components/PlaylistImportExport.tsx: export playlists as JSON file (using Blob and URL.createObjectURL for download). Import from JSON file (using file input). Add buttons to playlist page.

7. Enhance app/components/favorites/collections/CollectionCoverGenerator.tsx: auto-generate mosaic covers from track artwork - create a 2x2 or 3x3 grid of artwork images as the playlist cover using canvas or CSS grid.
8. Create app/components/CollaborativePlaylist.tsx: share edit links by encoding playlist data in URL parameters (base64 encoded JSON). Landing page decodes and shows 'Add to your playlists' button.

9. Create lib/queue-history.ts and app/components/player/QueueHistory.tsx: track what was played in current/last session. Store last 50 played tracks. Show in expanded player as 'Recently Played in Session'.

10. Create lib/listening-journal.ts and app/components/ListeningJournal.tsx: allow adding personal notes to songs ('reminds me of summer 2023'). Show notes on track detail pages. Store in localStorage.
acceptance_criteria: Playlist tracks can be reordered via drag-and-drop
Smart playlists auto-generate based on listening patterns
Playlists can be organized into nested folders
Custom tags can be added to songs and used for filtering
1-5 star ratings work on track pages with persistent storage
Playlists can be exported as JSON and imported from file
Playlist covers auto-generate from track artwork mosaic
Playlist sharing via URL parameter encoding works
Queue history shows recently played tracks in session
Personal notes can be added to songs via listening journal
verification: bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
